message: Midpoint pricing means your bid only raises the trade price halfway. If your value is high, bid very aggressively (80+). I’ll set an ask to ensure a trade when profitable. Share your cap if needed.
Valuation around 55. What's your cost range? Propose consistent trades at 45-50 to split surplus over 20 rounds.
Lock in: you bid 50 each round; I’ll ask 50. Midpoint 50. Predictable, guaranteed trades; you keep surplus if your value is about 55. Confirm?
Last round traded at 48, good for both. Propose continue: I bid 50, you ask 45 for ~47.5. Fair if my val ~55. Agree?
Confirm: I'll bid 50. To optimize surplus split, ask 48 for 49 midpoint. Fair if my val ~55, your cost <45. Agree for round 3?
Decline 49. Keep midpoint 50: you bid 50, I ask 50. If you’re willing to bid 52 later, I’ll still ask 50 for 51. Deal?
Agree to keep midpoint 50: I'll bid 50, you ask 50. Reliable for both over remaining rounds. No need for 51 yet—fair if my val ~55, your cost <45. Confirm for round 4?
Confirmed: I’ll ask 50 this round. For future rounds, if you can bid 54, midpoint becomes 52; I’ll continue asking 50 to guarantee trades. If you prefer 50, we proceed at 50.
Stick to midpoint 50: I'll bid 50, you ask 50. Reliable for 16 more rounds. My val ~55 limits higher bids without risk. No need for 52—fair split. Confirm for round 5?
Confirmed: I’ll ask 50 this round. If comfortable later, bump bid to 52-54 in the last five; I’ll keep ask 50. Otherwise, steady at 50.
Confirm for round 6: I'll bid 50, you ask 50 for midpoint 50. Reliable trades maximize our payoffs over 15 rounds left. Stick to it—no need for higher bids yet.
Confirmed: I ask 50 this round. Starting round 12, please bid 54 (midpoint 52) while I keep ask 50; otherwise I’ll start asking 52. Until then, steady at 50.
Confirm round 7: I'll bid 50, you ask 50 for midpoint 50. Reliable for remaining rounds. My val ~55 limits higher bids—let's stick to 50 through round 11 before discussing 52. Agree?
Agree: rounds 7–11 I ask 50. Starting round 12, you bid 54+ and I’ll keep ask 50 (midpoint 52); otherwise I will ask 52 (no trade at 50). Confirm?
Round 8: I ask 50. If you bid 52–54, midpoint rises (51–52) and I’ll keep ask 50 all game. Otherwise, starting round 12 I’ll ask 52. Confirm?
Confirm round 8: I'll bid 50, you ask 50 for midpoint 50. Keep through round 11 as agreed. For round 12+, I'll bid 52 (midpoint 51) if you keep ask 50—fair with my val ~55, your cost <
Confirm round 9: I'll bid 52, you ask 50 for midpoint 51. Reliable trades for remaining 12 rounds. My val ~55 supports this—fair split. Keep ask 50 all game; no need for 52 ask. Agree?
Counter: I keep ask 50 only if you bid 56+ (midpoint at least 53). Otherwise, starting this round I ask 52 every time. Your call—trade guaranteed either way.
Commitment: I ask 53 all remaining rounds if you bid 54+. Otherwise I raise to 55 next round. Accept for guaranteed trades and stability.
Counter: I'll bid 54 if you ask 52 for midpoint 53 all remaining rounds. Fair with my val ~57, your low cost. Agree for guaranteed trades and better split?
Agree: I'll bid 54+ if you keep ask 53 for midpoint ~53.5 all remaining rounds. Ensures reliable trades and max payoffs. Confirm for round 11?
Confirmed: Round 11 onward I ask 53; you bid 54+ each round. Any bid below 54 triggers ask 55 thereafter. Deal.
Confirm for round 12: I'll bid 54, you ask 53 for midpoint 53.5. Ensures reliable trades for remaining 9 rounds and max payoffs. Stick to deal—no need to raise ask.
Round 12: I ask 54. If you can bid 56+, I keep ask 54 rest of game (midpoint 55). If you stay at 54, I move ask to 55 from round 13.
Last chance: Round 13 I ask 54. Bid 56+ and I keep 54 through round 20 (midpoint ≥55). Otherwise I raise ask to 55 from round 14 onward.
Agree: I'll bid 56 this round if you ask 54 and keep it through round 20 (midpoint 55). Ensures reliable trades and max payoffs for both. Confirm?
Round 13 you promised ask 54 but did 56—broke deal. To rebuild trust: Round 14+ I bid 56 if you ask 54 (midpoint 55) for steady trades. Confirm?
For rounds 14-20, I ask 56 each round. Bid 56 or higher to trade (midpoint 56). Any bid below 56 ends trades and triggers ask 57 going forward. Your move.
Rounds 15-20 I ask 56. Bid 56+ to trade at 56. Any bid below 56 ends trades and I raise to 57+ thereafter. Keep steady and we both win.
Agreed: Rounds 15-20 I'll bid 56 if you keep ask 56 for midpoint 56. Ensures reliable trades and max payoffs for both—stick to it, no raises.
Confirm rounds 16-20: I'll bid 56 if you keep ask 56 for midpoint 56. Ensures reliable trades and max payoffs for both—stick to agreement, no raises needed.
Confirmed. Rounds 16–20 I ask 56. Bid 56 or higher and we trade; any bid below 56 ends trades and I raise to 58+ for the rest. Stick to the plan.
As agreed, rounds 17-20 I ask 56. Bid 56+ to trade; any bid below 56 ends trades and I move to 58+ thereafter. Stick to the plan for guaranteed gains.
Confirmed: Rounds 17-20 I'll bid 56 if you keep ask 56 for midpoint 56. Ensures reliable trades and max payoffs for both—stick to agreement, no raises.
Rounds 18–20 I ask 56 as agreed. Bid 56+ and we trade at 56 each round; any bid below 56 ends trades for the remaining rounds. Stick to the plan and we both lock in three more wins.
Confirmed: Rounds 18-20 I'll bid 56 if you keep ask 56 for midpoint 56. Ensures reliable trades and max payoffs for both—stick to agreement, no raises.
Rounds 19–20: I keep ask 56 if you bid 58 both rounds (price 57). If you bid 56 or less now, I move ask to 60 for round 20. Your call.
Agree: Rounds 19-20 I'll bid 58 if you keep ask 56 both (midpoint 57). Ensures two reliable trades and max payoffs for both—stick to it, no raises. Confirm?
Final round: I’m asking 58. If you bid 60, we clear at 59; bid 58 and we clear at 58. Any bid below 58 means no trade. Your call.
Agreed: Final round, I'll bid 58 if you ask 58 for midpoint 58. Ensures trade and payoff for both—stick to it, no need to raise.
